concepts_used.title: 矩阵运算
concepts_used.how_used: 使用3D坐标矩阵表示所有无人机的位置，并通过矩阵运算实现平移、旋转等动作。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We used matrices to implemented the representation of positions of drones in 3D space, and implemented the translation of image as a whole, and rotation of image as a whole about arbitrary axis in a few matrix operations.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用图表展示不同分组大小对总飞行距离的影响，以及碰撞次数等结果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We made some experiments on the group size, and found that when the group size was selected properly, the overall performance could be greatly improved.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变分组大小参数，测试对总飞行距离的影响，进行灵敏度分析。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Testing the Influence of the Group Size in the Image Transforming method

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion，包含摘要、引言、模型、验证、结论等部分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1 Introduction ... 2 Problem Restatement ... 3 Asumptions ... 4 Modeling the Motion ... 5 Modeling the Three Images ... 6 Model Verification ... 7 Safety consideration ... 8 Advantages and Disadvantages ... 9 Memo to the Mayor ... 10 appendix
